\noindent Define the new estimation set. We replace the original value of observation 22 with its winsorized value.

\par\addvspace{\topsep}

\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
USSteamCoEstim2 <- USSteamCoEstim
p5 <- quantile(ussteamco.mod.2$residuals, 0.05)
fit_22 <- fitted(ussteamco.mod.2)[22]
USSteamCoEstim2$revenue[22] <- fit_22 + p5
\end{Verbatim}
\endgroup
\par\addvspace{\topsep}

\noindent We then fit a new linear model.
